-e .

# dev
pre-commit
mypy
ruff
isort
pytest
pytest-mock
pytest-timeout
freezegun
types-Pygments
icecream

# WARNING: Don't bump grpcio-tools version without first bumping the protobuf in pyproject.toml
# to version 4.30+. The code generated by never versions of grpcio-tools is not compatible
# protobuf versions lower than 4.30.
#
# We intentionally keep the versions below as they are, to generate code that is compatible with protobuf 3.19,
# which is our minimum requirement
grpcio-tools==1.48.2
protobuf==3.19.6
mypy-protobuf==3.3.0
protoletariat==3.3.9
openapi-python-client==0.21.5
